reviews.feedback: bathroom should be attached to the bedrooms or near it, the hall seems useless between kitchen and bedroom
bathroom and kitchen shouldn't share walls.

this feels claustrophobic, why not remove some walls inbetween eg. living dining or just have decorative partition in between.  kitchen door is placed in a meaningless corner. it should be easily accessible from dining
the unit on the wall is rendered as undefined instead of ft. this is better but it can still avoid the hall that looks more like a walkway/corridor.
bath shouldn't be accessible directly from the door/entrance. it should be in the sleeping area without sharing wall with kitchen.
same avoid this hall acting like corridor/walk way it wastes space and make it feel claustrophobic
